headline: Anthropic’s Official Claude Opus 4.7 Release Notes, Enterprise Agentic AI Landscape 2026: Trust, Flexibility, and Vendor Lock-in (Kai Waehner), and OutSystems 2026 State of AI Development Report
snippet: Two model drops in 48 hours. One $300B funding quarter. And the quiet realization that “safety-gating” is becoming a product strategy, not just a PR talking point.

headline: Claude Opus 4.6, Google Gemini 2.5 Pro, and OpenAI’s Enterprise Push
snippet: Three of the world’s most-watched AI products dropped major updates within 48 hours — and none of them were trying to be subtle about it.

headline: Anthropic’s AI Agents Outperform Its Own Researchers, Opus 4.7 Incoming, and Snap’s AI Layoffs
snippet: A sneaker company pivoted to GPU rentals and gained 600% in a day. Meanwhile, Anthropic’s AI agents are outperforming its own alignment researchers.

headline: OpenAI’s Leaked Strategy Memo, Stanford’s 2026 AI Index, and Meta’s Zuckerberg Clone
snippet: The AI industry is in an unusually candid mood — spilling internal strategy memos, leaking source code, and publishing landmark research.

headline: Anti-AI Anger, Anthropic’s Mythos Bombshell, and $300B in Venture Capital
snippet: As anti-AI anger reaches Sam Altman’s front door and Anthropic withholds its most powerful model over cybersecurity fears, the industry is being forced to reckon with the consequences of breakneck deployment.

headline: AI’s Reckoning: Violence, Vulnerability, and $300B in Venture Capital
snippet: As anti-AI anger reaches Sam Altman’s front door and Anthropic withholds its most powerful model over cybersecurity fears, the industry is being forced to reckon with the consequences of breakneck deployment.

headline: Anthropic Is Close to Overtaking OpenAI on Enterprise AI Spending
snippet: At HumanX, Anthropic emerged as the enterprise AI leader while its frontier model Mythos triggered an emergency Wall Street meeting.

headline: Anthropic Hits $30B Run Rate — The Revenue Crown Changes Hands
snippet: Anthropic has officially passed OpenAI in annualized revenue, hitting a $30B run rate while spending roughly four times less on training.
